title: thelypteris microauriculata
intro: Thelypteris microauriculata, also known as the auriculated maiden fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of Thelypteris microauriculata include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a topical treatment for wounds and skin irritations. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its medicinal properties, or used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and salves.
